DISCOVERY, 302, DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S MOTION COMPELLING RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF HONGYANG AI. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED. FULLY COMPLIANT RESPONSES DUE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. THE PLAINTIFF OFFERED TO STIPULATE TO AN ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES IN ORDER TO AVOID THE TIME AND COST OF FILING THE PRESENT MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS, THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF DEFENDANT JACKY LUI TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF HONGYANG AI TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY ARE ORDERED TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,263.90 TO DEFENDANT JACKY LUI WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET NIVER, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND FOR MONETARY AND TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF HONGYANG AI AND HIS ATTORNEY - REQUEST FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PARTIES MUST APPEAR. PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER PRIOR TO THE HEARING ON THIS MOTION REGARDING THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES SERVED BY PLAINTIFF'S NEW COUNSEL. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SHALL BE PREPARED TO DISCUSS WITH SPECIFICITY WHICH INTERROGATORIES HAVE BEEN SUFFICIENTLY ANSWERED AND WHICH HAVE. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE SUM OF $1,068.80. SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID NOT LATER THAN 10 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF THIS ORDER AFTER HEARING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE HIPSHMAN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.=302/JPT

Notice Of Motion Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Attorney
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai And His Attorney
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOE BRAVO OF THE BRAVO & MARGULIES, TEL. NO. 1-415-512-6700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LAWRENCE J. LESS OF LESS & WEAVER, TEL. NO. 1-415-398-2800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai And His Attorney - Request for terminating sanctions is DENIED. PARTIES MUST APPEAR. Parties must meet and confer prior to the hearing on this Motion regarding the sufficiency of the Supplemental Responses served by Plaintiff's new counsel. Counsel for Defendant shall be prepared to discuss with specificity which Interrogatories have been sufficiently answered and which have. Request for Sanctions is GRANTED in the sum of $1,068.80. Sanctions shall be paid not later than 10 days after entry of this Order after hearing. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Anne Hipshman; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.=302/jpt

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LAWRENCE JAMES LESS, ESQ. of Less & Weaver, Tel No. 415-398-9800 appearing for Defendant Jacky Lui;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production And For Monetary Sanctions, the unopposed motion of Defendant Jacky Lui to Compel Plaintiff Hongyang Ai to Provide Further Responses to Defendant's First Set of Requests for Production and for Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff and his attorney is GRANTED. Plaintiff is ordered to serve full and complete verified responses to Defendant's First Set of Requests for Production of Documents within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. Plaintiff and his attorney are ordered to pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,263.90 to Defendant Jacky Lui within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Margaret Niver, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, For Monetary Sanctions And For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LAWRENCE JAMES LESS, ESQ. of Less & Weaver, Tel No. 415-398-9800 appearing for Defendant Jacky Lui;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, For Monetary Sanctions And For Terminating Sanctions, the motion of Defendant Jacky Lui to Compel Plaintiff Hongyang Ai to Provide Responses to Form Interrogatories, For Monetary Sanctions and for Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff and his attorney is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. Defendant's Motion to Compel Responses to Form Interrogatories is DENIED as moot. Defendant's motion for monetary sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff's attorney is ordered to pay $873.90 to Defendant Jacky Lui within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. Defendant's motion for terminating sanctions is DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Margaret Niver, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Defendant Jacky Lui Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set Two, To Have The Admissions Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai And His Attorney
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOE BRAVO, ESQ. of Bravo & Margulies, Tel No. 415-512-6700 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. LAWRENCE JAMES LESS, ESQ. of Less & Weaver, Tel No. 415-398-9800

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the judge pro tem. Matter argued and submitted by parties. The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set Two, To Have The Admissions Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai And His Attorney is granted in part. Defense counsel to submit proposed order to the Court for signature per oral argument at hearing. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai And His Attorney
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on Friday, October 14, 2015. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS COMPLAINANT JACKY LUI'S Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai And His Attorney is granted; responses to the form interrogatories to be served no later than ten days after service of notice of the court's written order. Sanctions awarded in favor of defendant and against plaintiff in the amount of $443.80, to be paid within ten days of service of notice of the court's written order. Order signed in open court. Notice Of Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JACKY LUI'S Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Hongyang Ai. The motion to compel is GRANTED. Objections are waived. Fully compliant responses due within 15 days of notice of entry of order. The request for sanctions is DENIED. The plaintiff offered to stipulate to an order compelling responses in order to avoid the time and cost of filing the present motion. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
